reviews.review_description: Nothing follows the norms of VR interaction. Menus  are hidden behind other objects and cannot be moved. The robot in the tutorial is the most annoying and patronising I've encountered in VR.
I can not go past the third lesson in the beginning thanks don
I cannot  place any objects .. so frustrating!!!!!!

It's pretty good except I have one huge problem, where you store Items on the rack storage wall..... It need to be able to be put that rack in my anyway or where because of my situation it will only go in 1 position against a wall which is not doable in my situation....it needs to be movable anywhere in space....till then can't play with it,listen to the customer....won't affect most ppl but me yes

developer_response.body: We are aware of our placement system and certain room setup situations that don't blend well. We are investigating possible solutions.

reviews.review_description: Something I look for, it is hardly find another one like this one.
It's impressive. You fully immerse in the possibility of a mixed reality and you can build a virtual railroad in your room
